description: [ELON] Add Clerk token validation to WebSocket connection handshake. Validate token on connect, attach userId to socket.data, enforce RBAC on event handlers. Disconnect on invalid/expired tokens.
successCriteria: WebSocket handshake validates Clerk session token
socket.data.userId and socket.data.role populated on connect
Event handlers check RBAC before processing
Invalid tokens result in immediate disconnect with error message
